storyboard.content: I vomited bright red blood twice this morning.
I feel very dizzy and weak right now.
My stomach has been more painful than usual over the past few days.
The vomiting blood happened this morning. The stomach pain has been building over the past few days.
I lost a significant amount of blood. The dizziness and weakness are severe.
I am a 52-year-old man. I have had stomach ulcers before.
I have been taking a lot of ibuprofen for my back pain, which may have irritated my stomach.
